title: Fractions, decimals and percentages — advanced
instruction: Answer these challenging questions combining English and maths.

questions.question: A mortgage document says 'LTV ratio: 75%'. LTV stands for Loan-to-Value. If your home is worth £200,000, how much is the mortgage?
A payslip says 'Tax deducted: 20% of gross pay'. If gross pay is £1,800, what is the tax?
Which sentence correctly compares decimals?
options: 0.3 is greater than 0.25 because 3 is less than 25
0.25 is greater than 0.3 because 25 is bigger than 3

questions.question: You earn £2,200 per month. You save 1/5 of your income. How much do you save per year?
A price rises from £80 to £96. What is the percentage increase?
After a 30% reduction, a coat costs £84. What was the original price?
